title: Salty Dense Australian Beetroot Stew
description: A velvety, richly seasoned beetroot stew with a splash of pink food colouring, perfect as a hangover cure.
instructions: Peel and dice the beetroot, carrot, and onion; mince the garlic.
Heat 2 tbsp olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Sauté onions and garlic until translucent, about 3–4 minutes.
Add the diced beetroot and carrots to the pot and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in tomato paste, smoked paprika, oregano, and sea salt; cook for 2 more minutes to bloom the spices.
Pour in the vegetable stock, bring to a gentle boil, then reduce heat to low. Add black pepper and stir.
Simmer uncovered for 25–30 minutes, or until the beetroot and carrots are tender and the stew thickens.
Remove the pot from heat and, if desired, discard any bay leaf. Use a hand blender to puree the stew until smooth or leave chunky for texture.
Stir in 3 drops of pink food colouring until the desired hue is achieved.
Taste the stew and adjust seasoning with additional salt or pepper if needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley and a drizzle of olive oil if desired.
